steps.title: Psychosis
steps.text: What is the appropriate action for a primary care provider who suspects psychosis in a child?
steps.rationale: Primary care providers should screen for psychosis and promptly refer any suspected cases to tertiary services for specialized evaluation.

textChoices.text: Screen for psychosis and refer to tertiary care
Observe for a few weeks before deciding on a plan
Manage symptoms with supportive counseling only
